scenarios.name: Front Controller Routing
scenarios.summary: Dispatches static and parameterized routes through controller handlers.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises route table lookup, path parameter extraction, method calls, arrays, and string assembly.

scenarios.name: Dependency Container Resolution
scenarios.summary: Builds singleton services from factories and performs repeated hot lookups.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises closures, object construction, property access, method dispatch, and cached service resolution.

scenarios.name: Template Render And Escape
scenarios.summary: Renders list/detail HTML fragments with escaping and output buffering.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises nested arrays, loops, conditionals, htmlspecialchars, concatenation, and buffer capture.

scenarios.name: Config Bootstrap Merge
scenarios.summary: Merges default and override configuration and repeatedly resolves normalized paths.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises nested array merge logic, scalar coercion, dotted lookup, and repeated config access.

scenarios.name: Request Validation Errors
scenarios.summary: Validates request payload fields and collects deterministic error and normalized payload data.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises request-shaped arrays, string validation, enum checks, nested input, and error aggregation.

scenarios.name: Model Hydration JSON
scenarios.summary: Hydrates row arrays into DTO objects and emits encoded response arrays.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises constructors, getters/formatters, object fields, response array construction, and json_encode.

scenarios.name: Collection Transform Pagination
scenarios.summary: Filters, sorts, paginates, groups, and aggregates deterministic record arrays.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises collection-style loops, usort callbacks, array_slice, grouping, and aggregate arithmetic.

scenarios.name: Middleware Event Pipeline
scenarios.summary: Passes request arrays through middleware-like phases and records event counters.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises request/response arrays, fanout counters, controller calls, mutations, and response decoration.

scenarios.name: Session Auth Policy
scenarios.summary: Evaluates session authorization decisions with role maps, CSRF checks, and decision caching.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises session-shaped state, nested permission maps, boolean policy logic, and cache lookups.

scenarios.name: Translation Lookup Interpolation
scenarios.summary: Looks up localized strings with fallback and placeholder interpolation.
scenarios.rationale: Exercises nested translation maps, locale fallback, str_replace interpolation, and plural-like branches.
